name: Crostata Di Frutta Di Stagione (Shortcake with Fresh Frui
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, and salt on a wooden pastry board.
2. Make a well in the center and add butter, egg yolks, and lemon rind. Mix and knead with fingertips, taking care not to handle too much.
3. When smooth, shape into a ball and chill for about 30 minutes.
4. Roll out lightly into a circle on a floured surface, keeping it about 1 inch larger than an 8- to 9-inch diameter flan tin. Butter and flour the pan, then fit the pastry into it, trimming the edges and pricking with a fork.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at moderate heat for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Beat together yolks and sugar until slightly thickened and light lemon-colored. Add flour and vanilla.
7. Over medium heat, bring milk just to a boil. Let it cool for a moment, then add it to the egg mixture, whisking rapidly. Cook over low heat until the pastry cream thickens enough to coat the back of a wooden spoon.
8. Cool the pastry cream. Spread evenly on the bottom of the pie.
9. Fill with fresh fruits and glaze with apricot jam melted with a little hot water.
10. This recipe serves 6 people.
